networkAccess.reasoning: Loads a local reconstruction run and its assets, then sends the finished Figma preview back to the local QA bridge. Figma's manifest validator rejects IP-literal hosts (e.g. 'http://127.0.0.1:8790') as an invalid devAllowedDomains URL, so only localhost is allow-listed here; ui.html normalizes any 127.0.0.1 address the user enters to localhost before making requests.
